name: numtype
description: NumType — n-dimensional arrays for TypeScript with compile-time shape checking (research spike)

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path crates/core/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p spike/src/wasm && cp crates/core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/numtype_core.wasm spike/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm
scripts.test:core: pnpm build:wasm && node --test spike/tests-runtime/add.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/fill.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/matmul.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/negative-paths.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/sum.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/transpose.test.ts
scripts.test:resident: pnpm build:wasm && node --test spike/tests-runtime/resident.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/resident-lifecycle.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/resident-gc.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/fromarray-overload.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/strided.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/strided-lifecycle.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/blocked.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/slice.test.ts
